ddls:
CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the borrower */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the borrower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan grade */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the document belongs to */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "doc_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_documents_document_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "document_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Payment reference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status change */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan the status change belongs to */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new status */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the status change occurred */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the status change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES loan_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the loan */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_origination" (
  "origination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origination process */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being originated */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the loan was approved */,
  "origination_fee" REAL /* Origination fee for the loan */,
  "underwriter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the underwriter who processed the loan */,
  "origination_status" TEXT /* Status of the origination process */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments about the origination process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_origination_underwriter_id FOREIGN KEY ("underwriter_id") REFERENCES underwriters ("underwriter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "underwriters" (
  "underwriter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each underwriter */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the underwriter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the underwriter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the underwriter */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the underwriter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("underwriter_id")
)
